body:
Hi @trontrytel , I made these tiny changes, just because it helped me follow as I was reading through the docs. 

I removed the old, not-working link for now. But if you have a better one we can substitute that one with, please let me know and I'll be happy to replace the link with another one. 

If you don't find the small adjustments useful, feel free to close the PR. 
Thanks.
title: Docs: small edits
